top_signals.title: The reason China is building most of the world’s robots
top_signals.summary: The country’s workforce is set to fall to 300mn by the end of the century. Beijing wants humanoids to narrow the labour gap
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tata Sons Listing Pressure Mounts as RBI Rejects Rule Tweaks
top_signals.summary: India’s central bank reaffirmed a framework for identifying systemically important shadow lenders, a decision that is likely to mount pressure on Tata Sons Pvt. to list its shares.

top_signals.title: Dozens dead in Venezuela after two powerful earthquakes
top_signals.summary: Hundreds injured as buildings toppled in capital Caracas

top_signals.title: Sony Pictures invests $100 million in giant-screen startup Cosm
top_signals.summary: Founded in 2020, Cosm serves food and offers seating that includes high-top tables and booths designed to create a more social theater experience.
